{{Quote|I have not heard of any new apprentices being accepted for training recently. What brings you to this place, may I ask?|Deesra to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] upon arrival on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]|<ref name="KotOR" />}}
'''Deesra Luur Jada''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Dorak]] to succeed him as the [[Jedi historian|Chronicler]] of the [[Jedi Enclave]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].

==Biography==
When [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] was sent to Dantooine to be retrained as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in [[3956 BBY]], Deesra warned him about the predatory [[Terentatek/Legends|terentateks]] and told the story of the unsuccessful [[Great Hunt (Jedi)|Great Hunt]] commissioned by the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] [[3995 BBY|forty years earlier]]. Despite his warning of the great danger presented by terentatek, Revan proved capable of single-handedly defeating two of the great beasts at a time.<ref name="KotOR" />

Deesra was still present on Dantooine when [[Darth Malak]] [[Attack on Dantooine (Jedi Civil War)|attacked]] the Jedi Enclave. He survived the attack and would return to the enclave [[3951 BBY|five years later]], continuing to teach to the new order after the [[First Jedi Purge]], after the enclave had been mostly rebuilt by the [[Lost Jedi]] that [[Meetra Surik]] set out to find.<ref name="EGTTF" />

In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], [[Tionne Solusar]] would study Deesra's account of the [[Jedi Civil War]].<ref name="EGTTF" />
